description:
Add CLI command `kb task steer <id> <message>` to add steering comments to tasks.

## Background
The dashboard allows adding steering comments via POST /api/tasks/:id/steer. Steering comments inject user guidance into AI execution context. CLI users need this for human-in-the-loop workflows.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add `kb task steer <id> <message>` command to `packages/cli/src/bin.ts`
- [ ] Implement `runTaskSteer(id, message)` in `packages/cli/src/commands/task.ts`
- [ ] Use `store.addSteeringComment(id, text, 'user')`
- [ ] Validate message length (1-2000 characters, per API validation)
- [ ] Display success confirmation with comment preview
- [ ] Support reading message from stdin if not provided as argument
- [ ] Handle errors: task not found, message too long, empty message
- [ ] Update CLI help text

## Technical Notes
- Steering comments are stored in `task.steeringComments` array
- Each comment has: id, text, author ('user' or 'agent'), createdAt
- Comments appear in agent execution context
- Validation: text must be 1-2000 characters (same as dashboard API)

## Parent Task
This subtask was identified as part of KB-182 dashboard vs CLI gap analysis.
